content.problemStatement: Print the number 108108108 using arithmetic operations on the numbers 999 and 121212.
constraints: No constraints as no input is required.
content.outputFormat: Print the integer 108108108 on a single line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required constant without any input.
Even without any input, the output remains the constant 108108108.
Repeated execution still yields the same constant value.

solution.approach: The problem does not require any computation. The program simply prints the constant value 108108108. No input is read, and the output is produced directly.

code.Java: import java.io.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args)throws Exception{System.out.println(108108108);}}
